title: erigeron paolii
intro: Erigeron paolii, also known as Paolii's fleabane, is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. This herb is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Erigeron paolii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Erigeron paolii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in a salve or topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
